extension.summary: Re-assert Kodi as the active HDMI-CEC source.
extension.description: A tiny companion helper for OppoKodiBridge. When run -- OppoKodiBridge invokes it over localhost JSON-RPC (Addons.ExecuteAddon -> script.cecreclaim) once a disc handoff ends -- it executes Kodi's CECActivateSource builtin so Kodi re-announces ITS OWN active source (legitimate, in-spec CEC) and the TV switches back to Kodi's input. Single-shot, no settings, no UI. The switch itself is open-loop (CEC has no acknowledgement).
extension.news: 1.1.0 -- Version bump to track OppoKodiBridge v4.1.0 (no functional change to the helper).
